title: Rustark Black Cellophane Wrap Roll 40CMx30M / 15.7inx100Ft Thick Cellophane Transparent Cello Wrapping Paper for Gift Wrapping Craft Flower Bouquet Baskets Decoration
features: 【 Great Value Kit 】 ----- You'll receive 1 roll of cello wrapping paper in this package, measuring approx. 40cm x 30m / 15.7inches x 100 feet (W. X L.). This cellophane roll will make your wrapping more unique and eye-catching. Sufficient length provided will meet your daily needs.

【 Reliable & Tear Resistant 】 ----- Made of premium cellophane material, this shiny cellophane paper is strong and won't easily rip with enhanced durability. The cellophane roll can provide additional support for gifts, baskets, flowers, while is great to keep moisture or dirt out.

【 Transparent Design 】 ----- The clear cellophane roll allows you to easily view your items, and it's waterproof, non-adhesive, and comfortable to touch. Not only keeps the items visible to others but also ensures their protection, preventing them from scattering

【 Different Color Option 】 ----- We offer assorted color options to meet your needs in wrapping projects, including black, red, blue, orange, and green, you can cut these cellophane rolls into plastic sheets for crafts to meet your DIY requirements.

【 Wide Application 】 ----- This cellophane wrapping paper roll is ideal for gift giving, party decor and packaging presents, suitable for packing gifts, flower bouquets, fruit baskets, boxes, photo frames, wine bottles, candies and more. Our cellophane wrap not only keep your items safely contained, but also make your gifts look glamorous and classy. You can use them to express your love for your family, friends, and your loved ones.
